purpose: B2 data-sizing pre-check for item-1 lift (methodology 2026-07-09)

truth_channel.term: "type 1 diabetes mellitus"[dis] AND ("pathogenic"[Clinical significance] OR "likely pathogenic"[Clinical significance])
truth_channel.caveat: RESIDUAL-LEAKAGE (B1): ClinVar P/LP for T1D shares its generative process with the OT genetic_association score the gate's floor thresholds on. This truth is genetics-flavored; item-1 lift is scoped to 'BEYOND genetics conditional on the floor-pass stratum', not 'gate beats genetics'.

B2_GATE_DECISION: CASE_STUDY (n<15): item 1 is reported as a test-fold decision replay with explicit n honesty, NOT an all-genes lift.
